base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of decoration_objects_barrels_etc — a tile from 1986 dragon quest. Scattered decoration tiles — barrels, pots, beds, chairs, flowers. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Scattered decoration tiles — barrels, pots, beds, chairs, flowers; placed in interior rooms; some are searchable (hidden items)
